_note: Machine-matchable meme/skit-format library (upgrade plan Phase 5; concepts/reference-humor-2026-07). Schema adapted from CM50 (concepts/master-research-2026-07 RQ4). Matched by scripts/lib/meme_match.py — PRECISION-FIRST: a verbal_trigger (or a strong visual+audio co-occurrence) is required, not embedding proximity alone (RQ4: naked embeddings/LLM underperform classical trigger matching). This is the AUDIO/SKIT-format dimension no off-the-shelf library covers. Grow it from reference_clips/*.notes.json + forensics decompositions. Each entry: name, aliases, verbal_trigger (phrases matched case/space-insensitively; regex allowed as {"re": "..."}), visual_signature (object keywords), audio_cue (audio_sense labels), threshold (per-format confidence floor, default 0.5), about, examples.

formats.name: george_bush_push
formats.about: Setup pun: ask 'ever heard of George?' then shove someone into a BUSH → 'George Bush'. Comedy is the verbal setup + physical act (+ often a fail), never stated outright.
examples: ReemKnocks pushing Silky toward a plant while saying 'ever heard of George?'

formats.name: vine_boom
formats.about: Deep bass 'Vine boom' dropped on a shock/reveal/punchline for ironic emphasis. Audio-carried.

formats.name: bruh_moment
formats.about: Deadpan disbelief at something dumb/awkward; the word or sound 'bruh' marks it.

formats.name: caught_in_4k
formats.about: Someone is caught/exposed on undeniable recorded evidence.

formats.name: took_an_L
formats.about: Acknowledging a loss/failure (an 'L'), often with mock sympathy audio.

formats.name: ratio
formats.about: Declaring a social-media 'ratio' as a dunk.

formats.name: it_is_what_it_is
formats.about: Resigned acceptance of an unfortunate outcome.

formats.name: record_scratch_freeze
verbal_trigger: you're probably wondering how i got here
formats.about: Record-scratch + freeze-frame + 'you're probably wondering how I ended up here' narrative flashback bit.

formats.name: mission_failed_respect
formats.about: 'Mission failed, we'll get 'em next time' over a fail.

formats.name: crickets_awkward
formats.about: Dead-air / no reaction to something that expected one; crickets punctuate it.
